description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: All of the Net Revenue from Step 0 ([A.2.

.1.2.1.1 - Net Revenue](bddce7bf-c568-444b-b196-e15a99016696)) becomes Step 1 Capital. 10% of Step 1 Capital is allocated for security and stability maintenance as specified in the documents herein. The remaining 90% of Step 1 Capital becomes Step 2 Capital and is allocated as specified in [A.2.
